title: Wynncraft Easily Invite
description: Easily invite others with only one click in Wynncraft!
body:
This mod allows you to quickly invite any player who types specific text in the chat. helping you get rid of the need of typing the invite command manually.

Once you type any text to chat with the identifier ####, like ##help##, then any player who types "help" in the next 30s will be invited by clicking the (invite) text after their message. see the pic below:

![the keyword will be colorized, and (invite) text would be attached to the the other player's message.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c2750fa19605cc665e29b8118c5ccc0339bea8e.png)
